source: Axis Bank India public summaries (approximate; verify fees and earn rates with axisbank.com)

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated cashback on bill payments via Google Pay on ACE; elevated earn on Swiggy, Zomato, Ola; base earn on other spends (see issuer T&Cs)
cards.lounge_access: Domestic lounge access per issuer program where applicable
cards.best_for: Utility bills via Google Pay and food delivery
cards.key_benefits: Cashback-focused everyday card with strong earn on bill pay and partner apps

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated cashback on Flipkart and partner brands; standard earn elsewhere (see issuer)
cards.lounge_access: Limited complimentary visits where program applies
cards.key_benefits: Co-branded cashback with Flipkart ecosystem benefits

cards.card_name: Axis Bank My Zone Credit Card
cards.reward_rate: Accelerated earn on dining, shopping and entertainment categories; base earn on other retail (see issuer)
cards.lounge_access: Select complimentary airport lounge visits per issuer rules
cards.key_benefits: Low-fee card with category accelerators for young professionals

cards.reward_rate: EDGE REWARD Points on retail spends with category accelerators (see Axis EDGE program)
cards.lounge_access: Complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar year
cards.best_for: Balanced rewards and travel perks at mid-tier fee
cards.key_benefits: Points redemption across travel and vouchers; milestone benefits per issuer

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated EDGE REWARD Points on travel and select categories; transfer partners per program rules
cards.lounge_access: Unlimited domestic lounge access and international lounge program where included
cards.key_benefits: Concierge-style benefits, travel vouchers/milestones and strong earn on travel

cards.reward_rate: Travel-focused EDGE miles/points earn; accelerated on airlines and hotels per issuer
cards.lounge_access: International and domestic lounge access per program
cards.key_benefits: Travel redemptions, milestone flight vouchers and lounge network

cards.reward_rate: Accelerated cashback on mobile recharges, utilities and select online spends (see issuer)
cards.key_benefits: Very low fee with cashback on everyday digital categories
